Override approval FAQ summary

Summary card that should not be part of the extracted body.

Override approval FAQ

Override approval FAQs matter when operators need direct answers about when a temporary approval path can stay active without undermining core safety controls.

The guidance explains how queue evidence, failover checkpoints, and approver rotation should be reviewed before an override answer is reused.

In practice, operators still need to confirm grace thresholds, fallback regions, and change logs before any answer is treated as an active approval.

The FAQ emphasizes that every approval answer should preserve shared throughput stability and leave a durable incident-review trail.
